children.text:
Choose the bell sound to be played at intervals. Also set [RING BELL CHANT].
VALUE: Temple Bell

Choose the sound to be played at end of meditation.
VALUE: Conch Shell

Number of times to repeat the [BELL SOUND] at end of meditation. To be used when [END NOTE SOUND] is [Repeat Bell].
VALUE: Not Set
D I S P L A Y

Set background color of the screen
VALUE: Black
Show system notification bar on top
G E N E R A L
Show the wordings of the mantra over the image. The subtitle icon below the image can be used to control individual subtitles.
